task: move green can near blue chip bag
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A green can is on a brown table. A blue chip bag is on the table to the left of the can. The can is cylindrical with a top opening; the chip bag is a flexible package. STRATEGY - The task is to move the green can. To avoid disturbing the chip bag, push the can horizontally. This is a direct manipulation with no need for grasping. Failure mode: pushing too hard could cause the can to roll off the table. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: reach the can body to apply force. Step 2: push the can horizontally to move it. Step 3: release to complete the action.**
Goal: moved(green_can)
Scene: green_can, blue_chip_bag, table
Step 1: reach(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_can, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_can) < 0.03
Step 2: push(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: pushing(green_can) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(1, 0, 0) [progress]
  safety: no_roll(green_can)
  done_when: distance(green_can, original_position) > 0.1
Step 3: release(green_can)
  affordance_region: the body of the green can
  contact: released(green_can) [completion]
  done_when: released(green_can)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the green can
the body of the green can
the body of the green can
